dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7409 IH: Defend Rural Health Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Taylor (for himself and Mrs. Miller of West Virginia) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend title XVIII of the Social Security Act to limit the geographic reclassification of certain hospitals under the Medicare program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Defend Rural Health Act of 2026.

section.header: Limiting geographic reclassification of hospitals under Medicare

subsection.text: Section 1886(d)(8)(E) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395ww(d)(8)(E)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in clause (i), by striking described in clause (ii) and inserting that is located in an urban area (as defined in paragraph (2)(D)) and meets any of the criteria described in subclause (I), (II), or (IV) of clause (ii) (or, with respect to a hospital submitting such an application before October 1, 2026, meets any of the criteria described in such clause);

subparagraph.text: in the matter preceding subclause (I), by striking a subsection (d) hospital and all that follows through criteria: and inserting the criteria described in this clause are the following:; and

clause.text: by inserting that is before designated by any law; and
by inserting , and that was so designated as of January 1, 2026 before the period at the end; and

paragraph.text: by adding at the end the following new clause:

clause.text: No subsection (d) hospital shall be treated as being located in a rural area of a State under this subparagraph on or after October 1, 2029, regardless of any application described in clause (i) submitted prior to October 1, 2026, unless such hospital demonstrates to the Secretary (in a form and manner specified by the Secretary) that such hospital meets any of the criteria described in subclause (I), (II), or (IV) of clause (ii).

subsection.header: Prohibiting dual reclassifications through the Medicare Geographic Classification Review Board
subsection.text: Section 1886(d)(10)(D) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395ww(d)(10)(D)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in clause (v), by striking Any decision and inserting Subject to clause (viii), any decision; and
by adding at the end the following new clauses:

clause.text: Such guidelines shall provide that the Board may not approve an application described in subparagraph (C)(i) submitted by a subsection (d) hospital requesting a change in geographic classification for a fiscal year beginning on or after October 1, 2026, if such hospital is treated as being located in a rural area under paragraph (8)(E) for such fiscal year.

With respect to a fiscal year beginning on or after October 1, 2026, no change in the geographic classification of a subsection (d) hospital that would otherwise be in effect for such fiscal year pursuant to a decision of the Board shall be effective for any portion of such fiscal year during which such hospital is treated as being located in a rural area under paragraph (8)(E).
